a: AMD Threadripper 3960X (24 cores / 48 threads)

q: How much RAM does TitanSarge have?
a: 128 GB
No. TitanSarge is CPU-only. Ollama inference runs on the Threadripper 3960X.
NVIDIA RTX 4070 (12 GB VRAM)
Intel Core i9-14900K
TitanShadow (10.0.0.32) on port 6333. URL: http://10.0.0.32:6333
Apple MacBook Air with M4 chip and 32 GB unified memory. IP: 10.0.0.10. Ollie's home node.
AMD Ryzen 9 5950X (16 cores / 32 threads) with an NVIDIA RTX 3060 Ti (8 GB VRAM). Runs Ollama.
TitanStrike is the OPNsense firewall appliance at 10.0.0.1. It serves as the network gateway, router, and VPN endpoint.
TitanStream is a Docker host running Technitium DNS and AdGuard Home. It may also run Ollama. Full inventory pending CX verification.
TitanShare is an Unraid NAS providing network storage for the array.

q: What port does Ollama run on?
a: 11434 on all nodes that run it (Sarge, MBA, potentially Shark and Stream).

q: What port does TitanFlow (Flow) run on?
a: 8800 on TitanSarge (10.0.0.33).

q: What port does TitanFlow (Ollie) run on?
What port does the v0.3 gateway run on?
What port does the telemetry HTTP bridge run on?

a: Two: 'titanflow_memories' (used by Flow on Sarge) and 'openclaw_memories' (used by Ollie on MBA). Both use 768-dim cosine similarity vectors from nomic-embed-text.

q: What is Flow's default LLM model?
a: flow:24b (configured in titanflow.yaml)

q: What is Flow's fallback LLM model?
a: qwen3-coder-next (configured in titanflow.yaml)

q: What is Ollie's default LLM model?
a: lfm2:24b (configured in titanflow-ollie.yaml)

q: What is Ollie's fallback LLM model?
a: gemma3:12b-it-qat (configured in titanflow-ollie.yaml)

q: What embedding model does mem0 use?
a: nomic-embed-text (768-dimensional vectors, cosine similarity).

q: What model does mem0 use for fact extraction?
a: cogito:14b via Ollama.

q: What cloud model is configured for escalation?
a: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 via Anthropic API.

q: What is the v0.2 core fallback model?
a: qwen3:14b (different from v0.1's qwen3-coder-next).

q: Where does Ollie's mem0 client connect for embeddings?
a: Sarge's Ollama at http://10.0.0.33:11434 — because MBA's local Ollama may not have nomic-embed-text and cogito:14b loaded.

q: Where does Flow's mem0 client connect for embeddings?
a: localhost:11434 (Sarge's local Ollama, which is the same machine Flow runs on).

q: Where is the main TitanFlow config file?
a: /opt/titanflow/config/titanflow.yaml (overridable via TITANFLOW_CONFIG env var).

q: Where is the v0.2 core config file?
a: /etc/titanflow/titanflow-core.yaml (overridable via TITANFLOW_CORE_CONFIG env var).
/run/titanflow/core.sock (overridable via TITANFLOW_CORE_SOCKET env var).
/run/titanflow/telemetry.sock (v03/config.py) BUT /run/titanflow-core/telemetry.sock (telemetry_http_runner.py). These DO NOT MATCH — potential bug.
/data/titanflow/titanflow.db on Sarge.
./data/titanflow-ollie.db (relative to working directory on MBA).
Kamal Datta — the father and operator of TitanArray. His Telegram user ID is 8568276170.
Flow is an AI agent running on TitanSarge. He is the primary TitanFlow instance on port 8800. Default model: flow:24b.
Ollie is an AI agent running on TitanMBA. He is the secondary TitanFlow instance on port 8801. Default model: lfm2:24b.
Kellen (Kid) is Papa's 8-year-old son and Ollie/Flow's brother.
CC (Claude Code) is Papa's coding agent running on TitanMBA via Claude Code CLI. Handles codebase hardening, audits, and deployments.
CX is Papa's research and verification agent. Currently running live node inventory on Shark and Stream.

q: What version of TitanFlow is currently deployed?
a: v0.2.1 — includes hardening audit + ChatResponse hotfix.

Full integration hardening: response validation on all external APIs, SSRF protection, SQL injection guards, IPC message size limits, config validation, fail-fast checks. 12 files modified, 23/23 tests passing.

Fixed _safe_extract_ollama_chat and _safe_extract_ollama_generate to accept both raw dicts (HTTP fallback) and Pydantic ChatResponse/GenerateResponse objects (Ollama SDK). Flow threw 'expected dict, got ChatResponse' on first boot after v0.2.0.

q: What values are hardcoded and cannot be overridden without code changes?
a: Qdrant URL (10.0.0.32:6333), Ollie's remote Ollama URL (10.0.0.33:11434), embedding model (nomic-embed-text), extraction model (cogito:14b), vector dimension (768), score threshold (0.35), top-k (5), Anthropic API endpoint, OpenRouter API endpoint, telemetry port (19100).

q: What is the telemetry socket path mismatch?
a: v03/config.py defines /run/titanflow/telemetry.sock but telemetry_http_runner.py hardcodes /run/titanflow-core/telemetry.sock. These paths DO NOT MATCH. If both are used at runtime, the telemetry bridge will fail to connect.

q: What happens if nomic-embed-text is removed from Sarge?
a: Both mem0 instances break. Flow uses localhost Ollama (Sarge), Ollie uses 10.0.0.33 (also Sarge) for embeddings. No fallback model is configured for embedding.

q: What happens if cogito:14b is removed from Sarge?
a: Memory fact extraction fails for both Flow and Ollie. mem0 capture() returns 0 facts silently. recall() still works (embedding-only). No fallback extraction model configured.

q: What happens if Qdrant on Shadow goes down?
a: mem0 gracefully degrades — recall() returns empty list, capture() returns 0. No crash. But long-term memory is completely lost until Qdrant recovers.
